sanskrit:
यतः प्रवृत्तिर्भूतानां येन सर्वमिदं ततम्।
स्वकर्मणा तमभ्यर्च्य सिद्धिं विन्दति मानवः॥
transliteration:
yataḥ pravṛttir bhūtānāṃ yena sarvam idaṃ tatam |
sva-karmaṇā tam abhyarcya siddhiṃ vindati mānavaḥ ||
literal_meaning: From whom the activity of beings proceeds, by whom all this is pervaded—by worshipping Him through one’s own duty, a human attains perfection.
contextual_meaning: Psychological integration occurs when every action is consciously linked to its transcendent source; duty becomes a ritual of re-uniting with the whole.
psychological_state: Flow-state through sacred framing of ordinary labor; ego dissolves into service.
trigger_scenario: A software engineer debugging code at 2 a.m. remembers the server-farm powers hospitals; each keystroke becomes an offering and exhaustion turns into quiet elation.
anchor_text: Work as worship, letting the Divine move through you.
